home.heroTitle: Discover the Ancient Art of Chinese Cloth Mosaic
home.heroSubtitle: Handcrafted textile paintings by a living heritage artisan — each piece one of a kind
home.storySnippet: For over four decades, Grandma has practiced the vanishing art of cloth patchwork painting — a Chinese intangible cultural heritage craft that transforms fabric scraps into breathtaking textured artworks.
